mapper.sql: select student_id, course_id, regular_score, extra_score, penalty_score, total_score, create_time, update_time from cl_score_summaries
mapper.insert:
insert into cl_score_summaries
student_id, course_id, regular_score, extra_score, penalty_score, total_score, update_time,
#{studentId}, #{courseId}, #{regularScore}, #{extraScore}, #{penaltyScore}, #{totalScore}, #{updateTime},
WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM cl_score_summaries WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND course_id = #{courseId} )
mapper.delete:
delete from cl_score_summaries where id in
#{id}
mapper.update:
UPDATE cl_score_summaries ss SET regular_score = ( SELECT SUM(sr.score * si.item_weight) FROM cl_score_records sr JOIN cl_score_items si ON sr.item_id = si.id WHERE sr.student_id = ss.student_id AND sr.course_id = ss.course_id AND si.item_type = 'regular' ), extra_score = ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(score), 0) FROM cl_score_records sr JOIN cl_score_items si ON sr.item_id = si.id WHERE sr.student_id = ss.student_id AND sr.course_id = ss.course_id AND si.item_type = 'extra' ), penalty_score = ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(score), 0) FROM cl_score_records sr JOIN cl_score_items si ON sr.item_id = si.id WHERE sr.student_id = ss.student_id AND sr.course_id = ss.course_id AND si.item_type = 'penalty' ), total_score = regular_score + extra_score + penalty_score, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE course_id = #{courseId}
AND student_id = #{studentId}

UPDATE cl_score_summaries ss JOIN ( SELECT student_id, course_id, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY course_id ORDER BY total_score DESC) AS ranking FROM cl_score_summaries WHERE course_id = #{courseId} ) ranks ON ss.student_id = ranks.student_id AND ss.course_id = ranks.course_id SET ss.ranking = ranks.ranking WHERE ss.course_id = #{courseId};
mapper.insert: insert into cl_score_summaries (student_id, course_id, regular_score, extra_score, penalty_score, total_score) select user_id as student_id , course_id, 0, 0, 0, 0 from cl_course_members where course_id = #{courseId} AND member_role = '1'
